title: NLP-024-how-do-you-use-spacy-for-text-processing
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-024 How do you use spaCy for text processing?

 24. How do you use spaCy for text processing?
答案要点:
Pipeline:
python
import spacy
nlp = spacy.load("en_core_web_sm")
doc = nlp("Apple is looking at U.K. startup")

 Tokenization
for token in doc:
    print(token.text, token.pos_, token.dep_)

 NER
for ent in doc.ents:
    print(ent.text, ent.label_)

 Noun chunks
for chunk in doc.noun_chunks:
    print(chunk.text)


质量评分: 92/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

sections.title: 24. How do you use spaCy for text processing?
sections.content:
**答案要点:**
**Pipeline:**
```python
import spacy
nlp = spacy.load("en_core_web_sm")
doc = nlp("Apple is looking at U.K. startup")

# Tokenization
for token in doc:
    print(token.text, token.pos_, token.dep_)

# NER
for ent in doc.ents:
    print(ent.text, ent.label_)

# Noun chunks
for chunk in doc.noun_chunks:
    print(chunk.text)
```

**质量评分**: 92/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
